integration_validation_v2.evidence: comfy.rs:256-269 map_comfy_output_to_intake_lane / map_comfy_routing_intent_to_intake_lane is the single deterministic image-sourcing->intake-lane routing rule; tests/atelier_comfy_intake_routing_tests.rs:73-109 asserts Artifact/Sidecar->Accepted, Transient->Skipped, and output-level==intent-level agreement (idempotent). Pure-function dispatch rule, no managed-resource surface, so sr2 NA; persisted record path is exercised by MT-100/MT-120 PG tests.

minimum_controls: Use contract-first identity and preserve projection hash.
risks: Imported MT contract may under-capture prose-only review or proof instructions.
